allow: Bash(git add backend/ .gitlab-ci.yml CLAUDE.md && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(backend\): scaffold FastAPI backend with Postgres, ChromaDB, Ollama

- FastAPI app with versioned API structure under /api/v1
- Pydantic Settings config loaded from environment variables
- Async SQLAlchemy engine + session dependency for PostgreSQL
- ChromaDB async HTTP client singleton
- Ollama httpx wrapper with generate\(\) helper
- /api/v1/health endpoint checks all three backing services
- Dockerfile for containerised deployment
- Update CI lint/test jobs to run real commands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add frontend/ .gitlab-ci.yml CLAUDE.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(frontend\): scaffold React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind frontend

- Vite build with @/ path alias and /api proxy to backend
- React Router v6 with App shell and nav
- Typed fetch wrapper \(api.get / api.post\) against /api/v1
- HealthPage polls /api/v1/health and renders per-service status
- Multi-stage Dockerfile: node build → nginx with SPA fallback
- nginx.conf proxies /api to aiyedun-backend container in production
- Update CI lint:frontend to run eslint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add infra/docker-compose.yml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
infra\(docker\): add backend and frontend services to Compose stack

- backend: built from ../backend, env-vars wired to all three services,
  on both aiyedun-internal and aiyedun-web networks, waits for
  postgres/chromadb/ollama healthy before starting
- frontend: built from ../frontend, on aiyedun-web only, waits for
  backend healthy, exposes port via FRONTEND_PORT \(default 3000\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add .gitlab-ci.yml infra/docker-compose.yml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ci\(pipeline\): add build and deploy jobs for backend and frontend

Build jobs:
- build:backend / build:frontend using docker:26-dind
- layer cache via --cache-from :latest
- pushes :SHA and :latest tags to GitLab Container Registry
- triggered on path changes or any push to main

Deploy jobs:
- deploy:dev — SSH deploy to dev host on develop branch
- deploy:prod — SSH deploy to prod host on main, manual gate
- pulls pre-built images by SHA, restarts containers via Compose

Required CI variables: DEPLOY_SSH_KEY, DEPLOY_HOST, DEPLOY_USER,
DEPLOY_HOST_PROD \(prod only\).

docker-compose: add image: field with BACKEND/FRONTEND_IMAGE+TAG
overrides so CI can inject registry images without rebuilding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add frontend/ .gitlab-ci.yml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
test\(frontend\): scaffold Vitest + Testing Library test suite

- Vitest with jsdom environment, globals, and @testing-library/jest-dom
- Coverage via v8 provider, outputs lcov + cobertura for GitLab
- src/test/setup.ts: imports jest-dom matchers globally
- client.test.ts: fetch mock covering get/post success and error paths
- HealthPage.test.tsx: loading state, all-ok render, degraded colour,
  and fetch failure scenarios
- App.test.tsx: nav render and route smoke test
- CI test:frontend job with coverage artifact uploaded to GitLab

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/ .gitlab-ci.yml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
test\(backend\): scaffold pytest test suite with respx and ASGITransport

- pytest.ini: asyncio_mode=auto, testpaths=tests
- requirements-dev.txt: pytest, pytest-asyncio, respx
- conftest.py: AsyncClient fixture via ASGITransport \(no real server\)
- test_config.py: database_url, chroma_url, ollama_url property assertions
- test_health.py: all-ok, postgres down, chromadb 503, ollama unreachable
  scenarios using respx mocks and AsyncSessionLocal patch
- test_ollama.py: generate\(\) response text, default model, HTTP error raise
- CI test:backend updated to install requirements-dev.txt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/ CLAUDE.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(backend\): scaffold Alembic async migrations

- alembic.ini: script_location=alembic, URL intentionally blank
- alembic/env.py: async engine via create_async_engine, URL from
  settings.database_url, imports app.models for autogenerate support
- alembic/script.py.mako: standard migration template
- alembic/versions/: empty directory with .gitkeep
- entrypoint.sh: runs alembic upgrade head before uvicorn starts
- Dockerfile: switches CMD → ENTRYPOINT via entrypoint.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add frontend/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(frontend\): scaffold UI components and layout shell

UI primitives \(src/components/ui/\):
- Button: variant \(primary/secondary/ghost/danger\), size, loading state
- Spinner: animated SVG, three sizes
- Input/Textarea: label, error message, accessible via useId
- Badge: variant \(ok/error/warning/neutral\) with ring styling
- Card: bordered container with optional title

Layout \(src/components/layout/\):
- Sidebar: NavLink list with active state, accepts NavItem[]
- PageHeader: title + optional actions slot

Wired into app:
- App.tsx: replaces inline nav with Sidebar, flex layout
- HealthPage.tsx: uses PageHeader, Card, Badge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add frontend/src/components && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
test\(frontend\): add component tests for all UI and layout components

Button: click handler, disabled, loading state disables + shows spinner,
  loading prevents onClick firing
Spinner: accessible label, sm/lg size classes
Input: label linkage, error message + border, user input, disabled
Textarea: label linkage, error message + border, user input
Badge: all four variants apply correct text colour classes
Card: children, optional title render, no heading without title
Sidebar: brand render, all nav links present, active/inactive link classes
PageHeader: title render, actions slot, no actions div when omitted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/ frontend/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(chat\): scaffold end-to-end chat feature

Backend:
- app/schemas/chat.py: ChatRequest / ChatResponse Pydantic models
- app/api/v1/endpoints/chat.py: POST /api/v1/chat — validates non-empty
  message, delegates to ollama.generate\(\), returns ChatResponse
- router.py: register chat router under /api/v1
- tests/test_chat.py: response shape, message forwarded to generate,
  empty message 422, missing field 422

Frontend:
- ChatMessage: user/assistant bubble, right/left alignment, role label
- ChatInput: textarea + send Button, Enter to send, Shift+Enter newline,
  clears on send, disabled state propagated to both controls
- ChatPage: message list with auto-scroll, loading "Thinking…" bubble,
  error display, empty-state prompt
- App.tsx: /chat route + Chat nav item added to sidebar

Tests:
- ChatMessage: content, role label, alignment classes
- ChatInput: empty disabled, enables on input, onSend called with
  trimmed value, clears after send, Enter/Shift+Enter, disabled prop
- ChatPage: empty state, user message shown, assistant response,
  thinking indicator, input disabled during load, error on failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/ frontend/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(documents\): scaffold end-to-end documents feature

Backend:
- app/models/document.py: Document ORM model \(id, filename, size, created_at\)
- app/models/__init__.py: import Document for Alembic autogenerate
- app/schemas/document.py: DocumentOut Pydantic schema
- app/api/v1/endpoints/documents.py:
    GET  /documents        — list all \(Postgres, ordered by created_at desc\)
    POST /documents        — multipart upload, store text in ChromaDB + metadata in Postgres
    DELETE /documents/{id} — remove from both stores, 404 if missing
- router.py: register documents router
- alembic/versions/0001_add_documents_table.py: initial migration
- tests/test_documents.py: list empty/items, upload 201 + chroma.add called,
  delete 204, delete 404

Frontend:
- api/client.ts: add api.del and api.upload \(FormData, no Content-Type header\)
- api/documents.ts: typed documentsApi \(list, upload, delete\)
- DocumentList: table with filename/size/date, delete button, deleting spinner
- DocumentUpload: file input \(.txt/.md/.pdf\), upload button disabled until file
  selected, error display on failure
- DocumentsPage: fetches on mount, optimistic add on upload, optimistic remove
  on delete, loading/error states
- App.tsx: /documents route + Documents nav item
- client.test.ts: extended with del and upload cases
- DocumentList.test.tsx, DocumentUpload.test.tsx, DocumentsPage.test.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/ frontend/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(search\): scaffold end-to-end semantic search feature

Backend:
- app/schemas/search.py: SearchRequest \(query, n_results 1-20\),
  SearchResult \(document_id, filename, excerpt, score\), SearchResponse
- app/api/v1/endpoints/search.py: POST /api/v1/search — validates
  non-empty query, queries ChromaDB "documents" collection, returns
  cosine similarity score \(1 - distance\), truncates excerpts to 300
  chars, gracefully returns empty results if collection missing
- router.py: register search router
- tests/test_search.py: results shape, empty collection, empty query
  422, excerpt truncation, n_results forwarded to ChromaDB

Frontend:
- api/search.ts: typed searchApi.search\(query, n_results\)
- SearchBar: text input + submit button, disabled on empty/whitespace,
  loading state propagated
- SearchResultCard: filename, rank, score as % badge \(ok/warning/error
  by threshold\), excerpt with line-clamp
- SearchPage: search bar, result count summary, result list, error state
- App.tsx: /search route + Search nav item
- SearchBar.test.tsx, SearchResultCard.test.tsx, SearchPage.test.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/ frontend/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(auth\): scaffold end-to-end user authentication

Backend:
- requirements.txt: add PyJWT 2.10.1, passlib[bcrypt] 1.7.4
- app/core/config.py: add jwt_expire_hours \(default 8\)
- app/core/security.py: hash_password, verify_password \(bcrypt\),
  create_access_token, decode_access_token \(HS256 JWT\)
- app/models/user.py: User ORM model \(id, username, email,
  hashed_password, is_active, created_at\)
- app/models/__init__.py: import User for Alembic autogenerate
- app/schemas/auth.py: LoginRequest, TokenResponse, UserOut
- app/api/deps.py: get_current_user dependency via OAuth2PasswordBearer
- app/api/v1/endpoints/auth.py:
    POST /auth/login  — verify credentials, return JWT
    GET  /auth/me     — return current user \(requires auth\)
- router.py: register auth router
- alembic/versions/0002_add_users_table.py: users table migration
- tests/test_auth.py: login success/wrong-password/unknown-user/
  inactive, /me valid token, /me no token, /me invalid token

Frontend:
- api/client.ts: attach Authorization: Bearer <token> from localStorage
  to all requests \(request + upload functions\)
- api/auth.ts: authApi.login, authApi.me
- contexts/AuthContext.tsx: AuthProvider — restores session from
  localStorage on mount, login\(\), logout\(\)
- components/auth/LoginForm.tsx: username/password fields, error display,
  disabled until both filled
- components/auth/ProtectedRoute.tsx: spinner while loading, redirects
  to /login if unauthenticated
- pages/LoginPage.tsx: centred login form, redirects to /chat on success
- App.tsx: AuthProvider wraps all routes; /login unprotected;
  all other routes wrapped in ProtectedRoute via AppShell
- Tests: LoginForm \(5\), ProtectedRoute \(3\), AuthContext \(5\), App \(2\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/ frontend/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(auth\): scaffold user registration

Backend:
- requirements.txt: add email-validator 2.2.0 for EmailStr support
- app/schemas/auth.py: RegisterRequest with field validators —
  username alphanumeric ≥3 chars, password ≥8 chars, passwords match,
  email validated via EmailStr
- app/api/v1/endpoints/auth.py: POST /auth/register — checks username
  and email uniqueness \(409 on conflict\), hashes password, persists
  User, returns UserOut with 201
- tests/test_auth.py: register success, 409 conflict, short password,
  mismatched passwords, short username, invalid email

Frontend:
- api/auth.ts: add authApi.register\(\)
- RegisterForm: username, email, password, confirm-password fields;
  disabled until all filled; error display; loading spinner
- RegisterPage: calls authApi.register then login, redirects to /chat;
  link to /login; redirects if already authenticated
- LoginPage: add "Create one" link to /register
- App.tsx: /register route added alongside /login \(both public\)
- RegisterForm.test.tsx \(5 cases\), RegisterPage.test.tsx \(4 cases\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/ frontend/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(admin\): scaffold end-to-end admin user management feature

Backend:
- app/models/user.py: add is_admin \(Boolean, default False\)
- app/schemas/auth.py: add is_admin to UserOut
- app/schemas/admin.py: UserUpdateRequest \(is_active, is_admin optional\)
- app/api/deps.py: add get_current_admin dependency \(403 if not admin\)
- app/api/v1/endpoints/admin.py:
    GET    /admin/users          — list all users ordered by created_at
    PATCH  /admin/users/{id}     — update is_active / is_admin; 400 on
                                   self-deactivation or self-demotion
    DELETE /admin/users/{id}     — delete user; 400 on self-deletion
- router.py: register admin router
- alembic/versions/0003: add is_admin column \(server_default false\)
- tests/test_admin.py: list \(success + 403\), update \(success, 404,
  self-deactivate, self-demote\), delete \(success, self, 404\)

Frontend:
- api/client.ts: add api.patch method
- api/auth.ts: add is_admin to AuthUser type
- api/admin.ts: adminApi.listUsers, updateUser \(PATCH\), deleteUser
- AdminRoute: spinner → redirect /login \(unauth\) → redirect / \(non-admin\)
  → render children \(admin\)
- UserTable: username, email, active/admin badges, per-row
  Deactivate/Activate, Remove admin/Make admin, Delete buttons;
  self-row fully disabled
- AdminPage: fetches users, optimistic updates, error display
- App.tsx: Admin nav item shown only for is_admin users; /admin route
  wrapped in AdminRoute inside AppShell
- Tests: AdminRoute \(4\), UserTable \(10\), AdminPage \(4\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)
